title: BetterTempban
body:
**BetterTempBan** is a plugin for Paper servers that helps administrators ban players for a certain amount of time. OPs can ban any player whether they are online or offline and give a reason for the ban.

The ban is UUID-based on online servers so name changes never bypass a ban. Running a cracked server? Flip one config option and it switches to username-based tracking automatically.

**Features**
- `/tempban <player> <time> <reason>` — Ban any player, online or offline
- `/tempunban <player>` — Unban from in-game or console
- Supports `s`, `m`, `h`, `d` time units (e.g. `30m`, `12h`, `7d`)
- Custom disconnect screen showing ban date, banner, reason and time remaining
- UUID-based tracking
- Cracked server mode — switches to username-based tracking with one config toggle
**Commands**

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| `/tempban <player> <time> <reason>` | Temporarily ban a player | `bettertempban.ban` |
| `/tempunban <player>` | Remove a temporary ban | `bettertempban.unban` |

**Permissions**

| Permission | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `bettertempban.ban` | Access to `/tempban` | OP |
| `bettertempban.unban` | Access to `/tempunban` | OP |
| `bettertempban.bypass` | Bypass temp bans entirely | `false` |

**Configuration**


<details>
<summary>config.yml</summary>

cracked-server: false


</details>

![Support!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f83e5ea5328d40f4f650ecf2b21474e018790f0.png)

Remember, advertising must not be intrusive and annoiyng!

What you can do? Make a video review / advertisement

Tell your friends about this plugin

Just download this plugin (if you want to play with it :D)
